text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Satsuki Sho is here. Being the first
race of the Classic Triple Crown, the crowd's
expectations are high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, many in the crowd express doubts as to
whether Smart Falcon, a dirt runner, will be able
to perform on turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite trying to put on a brave face, Smart
Falcon isn't able to hide her nervousness. I send
her off with an encouraging chant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning concerts at Classic Triple Crown races
are special, and Smart Falcon heads to the race
aiming to take center stage.
